name_en: With full original retail packaging 🌷【New】MIU vintage shoulder bag, brand new soft nappa leather full of retro nostalgia, paired with aged metal hardware, premium and elegant texture, drawstring closure design, fine pleated ruffles are three-dimensional and playful, high-end yet lazy and casual, lined with brand new striped canvas, equipped with a zippered pocket, unique design looks good on everyone.
name_cn:
With full original retail packaging 🌷【New】MIU vintage shoulder bag, brand new soft nappa leather full of retro nostalgia, paired with aged metal hardware, premium and elegant texture, drawstring closure design, fine pleated ruffles are three-dimensional and playful, high-end yet lazy and casual, lined with brand new striped canvas, equipped with a zippered pocket, unique design looks good on everyone.
Model: 5BG306.
Size: 32✖️16✖️10.5
Color: Brown full leather/Original leather.
Italian creation
